verses.text: Kumpi Artakzaksis' kum sawmnihna Nisan kha sungin khatvei, a leenggahzu a baihsa-in a om khit ciangin la-in kumpipa ka pia a, ama mai-ah ka om laitakin ka mai a khing hi
Amah in, “Cina lopi-in bang hangin na mai khing ahi hiam? Na dahna khat om hi ding hi,” hong ci hi. Tua ciangin lau mahmahna tawh
kumpipa ka dawng a, “Kumpipa nungta tawntung in. Ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi siagawp a, a kongpite kangtum ahih ciangin maikhing loin bangci om theih ding ka hi hiam?” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Kei tungah bang hong ngen nuam na hi hiam?” hong ci hi. Kei zong ka lungsim tawngah vantung Pasian kiangah thu ka ngen a

tua khit ciangin kumpipa dawngin, “Kumpipa na lung a kim a, dik na sak leh, ka puahphatkik theihna dingin Judah gamsung ka pute ka pate a kivuina khuapi-ah nong paisakna ding kong thum hi, topa,” ka ci hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in (kumpinu a gei-ah tukawmin), “Bang tanvei sawt ding a, cik ciangin hong ciahkik thei ding na hi hiam?” ci-in hong dong hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in ka ngetna hong thukimpih a, kei zong ka ciahkik ding hun ka gen hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah, “Kumpipa na thukim leh, Judah gam ka tun' dong amaute in hong paisuaksak theihna dingun Eufratis Gungal gamsung a uksawn mite ka piak ding laikhakte

leh biakinn hutna ding munmuan'huai kongpi ding, khuapi kulh ding, leh ka omna ding inn lamna dingin sing hong piaktheihna dingin kumpipa' tulak a kem Asaf' tungah piak ding laikhak zong, kei tungah hong pia in,” ka ci hi. A dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompih ahih manin kumpipa in ka ngette hong pia hi
Tua ahih ciangin Eufratis Gungal gam a uksawn mite kiang ka tung a, kumpipa' laikhakte amaute tungah ka pia hi. Kumpipa in galkapmangte leh sakol galkapte kei hong khasak hi
Ahi zongin Israel mite' phattuamna ding a sem dingin mi khat a paina thu Horonaim khuami Sanballat leh Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah in a zak uh ciangin nakpi takin lungkimlo uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Kulhte a Ciangkik dingin Nehemiah in Mite Hanthawn

verses.text: Jerusalem khua ka tun' ciangin ni thum sung ka tawlnga hi

Tua ciangin zanin vakkhia-in mi tawmkhat ka tonpih hi. Ahi zongin Jerusalem-a' dingin ka bawlsak ding ka Pasian in ka lungsimah hong suahsak thu kuama kiangah ka gen kei hi. Keima tuan'na simloh ganhing dang ka kizuisak kei hi
Kuam Kongpi tawnin Gulpi Tuikhuk leh Nin Kongpi lamah ka pai a, a kicimsa Jerusalem kulhpi leh mei in a kattumsa a kongpite ka en hi
Tua ciangin Tuinak Kongpi leh Kumpipa' Bual-ah ka paisuak hi. Ahi zongin ka tuan'na ganhing a paisuak theihna ding mun omlo hi
Tua hi a, a zanpi mahin kuam lampi-ah pai-in khuapi kulh ka vel hi. Tua ciangin Kuam Kongpi mah tawnin khuapi sungah ka lutkik hi

Tua hi a, khuasung upate in ka paina mun ahi a, ka sep ahi zongin theilo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh hih nasep tavuan a la ding Judah mite, siampite, uliante, khuasung upate, leh a dangte tungah ka gen nai kei hi

Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “I lungkhamna thu na thei uh hi. Jerusalem a siasa-in omin, a kongpite mei in kangtum hi. Hong pai un, zahkona i ngah nawnlohna dingin Jerusalem kulh ciangpha ni,” ka ci hi

Tua ciangin a dik ka Pasian in kei hong ompihna leh kumpipa in kei tungah hong gen thute zong amaute tungah ka gen hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Tu-in nasep kipan pah ni,” hong ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin lawp mahmahna leh ngimna hoih tawh nasep a kipan uh hi

Ahi zongin Horonaim khuami Sanballat, Ammon mi sal ahi Tobiah, leh Arab gammi ahi Geshem in tua thu a zak uh ciangin, kote zahpihna leh simmawhna tawh, “Hih na sep uh bang ahi hiam? Kumpipa lehpan' na hi uh hiam?” hong ci uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute dawngin, “Vantung Pasian in ka ma uh hong telhsak ding a, ko ama nasemte in nasep a kipan ta ka hi uh hi; note in ahih leh Jerusalem tawh kisai-in thu na neih theihna dingun bangmah kimematna na nei kei uh hi,” ka ci hi.
